activities.title: Dehydrate Attachment After Read
activities.description: Post-assistant-completion hook collapses image attachment_ref parts to text annotation + filesystem-staged binary (C1, DD-1, DD-3, DD-5).

activities.title: Reread Staged Binary
activities.description: Tool exposing IncomingStore.get to the model; returns fresh image content block (C3, DD-9).

activities.title: Serialize Dehydrated Stub To Wire
activities.description: MessageV2.toModelMessages branches on dehydrated=true → emit text block instead of image_url (C4, DD-8).

activities.title: Garbage Collect Expired Staging
activities.description: Sweep incoming/<sid>/ for sessions deleted > TTL days ago (C5, DD-4, DD-11).

arrows.label: DD-3 always-dehydrate policy + DD-10 skip-on-failed-turn rule
rewritten attachment_ref part with dehydrated=true + annotation; binary moved
fresh image content block OR attachment_expired error
ModelMessage[] for AI SDK; dehydrated parts as text blocks
daemon startup tick OR daily cron tick
incoming/<sid>/ removed for expired sessions; telemetry attachment.gc.swept

activities.title: Extract Annotation
activities.description: Pure function over assistant response text → trimmed annotation ≤ 4000 chars (head + tail truncation if longer). C6, DD-12.

activities.title: Move Binary To Incoming
activities.description: Read binary from sqlite attachments table → write to filesystem via IncomingStore.put → delete sqlite row.

activities.title: Rewrite Attachment Part
activities.description: Session.updatePart with dehydrated=true, annotation, sha256, incoming_path. Idempotent guard via dehydrated check (DD-5).

arrows.label: DD-5 idempotency: skip if part already has dehydrated=true
rewritten attachment_ref part persisted to session storage

validation_notes: Each activity has at least one input arrow + one output arrow per IDEF0 §5 ICOM rules.
ModuleRefs in grafcet.json reference these activity IDs.
